200.q: I run across America, love Jenny, and accidentally drift through history
I am the brightest witch of my age and one of Harry Potter's closest friends
I am the pirate captain with a compass that points to what I want most
Say hello to my little friend. I am the cocaine king of Scarface
You talkin' to me? I am the unstable cab driver from Taxi Driver
I click my ruby slippers and dream of returning to Kansas
I own a chocolate factory and love golden tickets
I fake being sick to skip school in 1980s Chicago
I am the Wall Street killer obsessed with Huey Lewis and business cards
I am the wide-eyed waitress from Paris in Amelie
I am the leather-clad ally of Neo in The Matrix
I am the lion villain with a scar and a murderous plan to take Pride Rock
I am the survivor and mother at the heart of the Terminator films
I am the split-personality anarchist of Fight Club
I'm the space ranger toy who arrives believing I can really fly
I'm the princess-turned-ogre who falls in love with Shrek
I hide as a man to save China in Disney's Mulan
I built the Iron Man suit in a cave, I have an AI named JARVIS, and I said I am Iron Man
I grew up on a moisture farm on Tatooine, discovered the Force, and learned my father was Darth Vader
I am a mermaid princess who traded my voice for a chance to live on land
I'm the lion prince of the Pride Lands, and I return home to reclaim my kingdom
I'm a practically perfect nanny who flies with an umbrella and changes a family's life
I'm a green ogre from a swamp, and I remind everyone that ogres have layers
I'm the girl chosen by the ocean to sail across the sea and restore Te Fiti's heart
I'm a lonely trash-compacting robot who finds purpose after meeting EVE
I believe wiping out half the universe is mercy, and I wear the Infinity Gauntlet
I take the red pill, dodge bullets, and learn I am The One
I let it go, build an ice palace, and fear hurting everyone I love
I am the wise king of the Pride Lands, and I teach my son about the circle of life
I wear black armor, command the Empire, and reveal one of cinema's most famous family secrets
I'm a teenage superhero balancing school, queens, and neighborhood crime in the MCU
I'm a robotic AI suit inventor with a goatee and a taste for showmanship
I'm a boy with a lightning bolt scar raised under the Dursleys' stairs

400.q: I am the revenge-driven bride in a yellow jumpsuit from Kill Bill
I am Vincent Vega's unforgettable dance partner in Pulp Fiction
I am the Roman general who becomes a gladiator seeking vengeance
I rule North Shore High, wear pink, and everyone in Mean Girls fears me
I am the ogre princess who can handle herself far better than any fairy-tale damsel
I am the mohawked hacker-survivor from The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
I fake insanity, battle Nurse Ratched, and become the soul of One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
I'm the road warrior of a post-apocalyptic wasteland
I'm the anarchic alter ego behind soap, fights, and mayhem
I rule over Halloweentown and sing about it dramatically
Guess from the image
I'm a terminator sent from the future, and I tell people I'll be back
I'm an elite hitman whose retirement ends after my dog is killed
I hide deep in the jungle, talk about napalm in the morning, and become the dark heart of Apocalypse Now
I'm a cannibal psychiatrist whose polite manners hide a terrifying mind
I'm an obsessive fan who traps her favorite writer in a remote house
I'm a mutant mastermind who can control metal and lead whole nations of followers
I flip coins for fate, use a cattle gun, and walk through No Country for Old Men like death itself
I created Jurassic Park believing wonder would beat chaos, and I was very wrong
I descend into madness as Gotham embraces me, and the world knows me as Joker
I carry a fedora, a whip, and a lifelong talent for running from giant disasters
I accept impossible missions, sprint across rooftops, and somehow survive every one of them
I go from small-time boxer to one of cinema's most iconic underdogs
I volunteer for my sister, survive the Hunger Games, and become the Mockingjay
I mentor Neo, wear dark glasses, and explain the Matrix to the audience
I split my soul into Horcruxes, fear love itself, and the wizarding world knows me as the Dark Lord
I'm a sword-swinging pirate captain with a gold tooth and a fondness for rum
I'm a Scottish warrior painted blue who cries for freedom
I carry a chocolate factory inherited from a purple-coated genius
I'm a robot assassin from the future covered in liquid metal
I'm the green half of a mutant duo who ends up in the body of a therapist
I'm the girl in the yellow jumpsuit swinging a katana for revenge
I'm the pint-sized assassin who wears big shoes and a long coat
I'm a space pirate with a raccoon friend and a sentient tree for a sidekick

600.q: I am the liquid metal assassin from Terminator 2
I am the writer descending into madness in The Shining
I am the rebel princess of Alderaan fighting the Empire
I'm the blade runner hunting replicants through rain and neon
I'm the isolated writer slowly going mad at the Overlook Hotel
I drink milkshakes and crush rivals in There Will Be Blood
I am the feared patriarch of the Corleone family, and people still come to me on the day of my daughter's wedding
I ride a hoverboard, travel through time in a DeLorean, and accidentally wreck history more than once
I survive Judgment Day more than once and raise the future leader of the resistance
In space, no one can hear me scream - I survive the xenomorph by being tougher than everyone else
I hunt Buffalo Bill with Hannibal Lecter's help and become one of the FBI's most famous agents
I pilot the Millennium Falcon, brag about the Kessel Run, and definitely shoot first
I wield thunder, fly with a hammer, and eventually learn I was never the god of hammers
I return every 27 years to feed on fear and often wear a clown's smile
I build an empire out of newspapers, vanity, and one word: Rosebud
Yippee-ki-yay - I'm the cop who keeps surviving impossible situations in the wrong place at the wrong time
